mapper.select: SELECT s.*, s.seller_status status, COALESCE(pc.product_count, 0) AS product_count, COALESCE(oc.order_count, 0) AS order_count, COALESCE(oc.sales_amount, 0) AS sales_amount FROM sellers s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT seller_id, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY seller_id ) pc ON pc.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.seller_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS sales_amount FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY p.seller_id ) oc ON oc.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE s.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT s.*, s.seller_status status, COALESCE(pc.product_count, 0) AS product_count, COALESCE(oc.order_count, 0) AS order_count, COALESCE(oc.sales_amount, 0) AS sales_amount FROM sellers s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT seller_id, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY seller_id ) pc ON pc.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.seller_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS sales_amount FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY p.seller_id ) oc ON oc.seller_id = s.seller_id
s.seller_status = #{status}
AND s.user_id = #{user_id}
AND s.seller_id = #{seller_id}
AND ( s.company_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") or s.representative_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") )
AND s.created_at >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND s.created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY s.created_at ASC, s.seller_id ASC
ORDER BY s.company_name ASC, s.seller_id DESC
ORDER BY product_count DESC, s.seller_id DESC
ORDER BY order_count DESC, s.seller_id DESC
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC, s.seller_id DESC
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC, s.seller_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sellers ( user_id, company_name, business_number, representative_name, opening_date, business_address ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{company_name}, #{business_number}, #{representative_name}, #{opening_date}, #{business_address} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sellers SET company_name = #{company_name}, business_number = #{business_number}, representative_name = #{representative_name}, opening_date = #{opening_date}, business_address = #{business_address} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.order_id END) AS newOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PREPARING' THEN o.order_id END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN o.order_id END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN o.order_id END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN o.order_id END) AS cancelledCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.status IN ('RETURN_REQUEST', 'EXCHANGE_REQUEST') THEN o.order_id END) AS returnExchangeCount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
LEFT JOIN order_item_claims c ON c.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock > 0 THEN 1 END) AS onSaleCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock = 0 THEN 1 END) AS outOfStockCount FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON p.product_id = q.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND q.answered_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.option_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at,
p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL,
po.option_name AS option_name, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) AS option_price,
(oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
LEFT JOIN product_options po ON po.option_id = oi.option_id
WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders o SET o.status = #{status}, o.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.seller_id, s.user_id, s.company_name, s.business_number, s.representative_name, s.opening_date, s.business_address, u.photo_name, IFNULL(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS review_avg, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS review_count, COUNT(DISTINCT f.product_id) AS product_favorite_count FROM sellers s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN favorites f ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE s.seller_id = #{seller_id} GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.user_id, s.company_name, s.business_number, s.representative_name, s.opening_date, s.business_address, u.photo_name
SELECT notice_id, title, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_at FROM notices ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN oi.price * oi.quantity ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS todaySales,
COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN oi.price * oi.quantity ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS monthSales,
COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS totalSales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED')

SELECT DATE(o.created_at) AS salesDate, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS salesAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') AND o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(o.created_at) ORDER BY DATE(o.created_at)

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS totalQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS totalSales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY totalSales DESC

SELECT c.name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) AS salesAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_item_claims SET status = #{status}, seller_answer = #{seller_answer}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE claim_id = #{claim_id} AND status IN ('RETURN_REQUEST', 'EXCHANGE_REQUEST')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_claims ( order_item_id, status, reason, detail_reason, seller_answer, requested_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{order_item_id}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{detail_reason}, #{seller_answer}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
